Name            : libfoo
Version         : 1.2.3-1
Description     : A foundational library that does many useful things
                  across multiple subsystems and wraps onto a second line
Provides        : libfoo.so=1-64  foo-compat=1.2
Depends On      : glibc  gcc-libs>=13
Optional Deps   : None
Required By     : barapp
Installed Size  : 956.00 KiB
Install Reason  : Installed as a dependency for another package

Name            : bigpkg
Version         : 9.0-1
Description     : Large package
Provides        : None
Depends On      : None
Optional Deps   : optdep-one: does a thing [installed]
                  optdep-two: does another thing
Required By     : None
Installed Size  : 1.23 GiB
Install Reason  : Explicitly installed
